name: Prestidigitation

options.label: Sensory Effect
options.summary: Create an instantaneous harmless sensory effect such as sparks, wind, music, or odor.

options.label: Fire Play
options.summary: Light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire.

options.label: Clean Or Soil
options.summary: Clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.

options.label: Minor Sensation
options.summary: Chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.

options.label: Magic Mark
options.summary: Make a color, mark, or symbol appear on an object or surface for 1 hour.

options.label: Minor Creation
options.summary: Create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in your hand until the end of your next turn.

modeChoice.notes: Up to three non-instantaneous Prestidigitation effects can be active at a time.

effects.description: You create one of the following magical effects within range: 1) A harmless sensory effect (sparks, wind, music, odor). 2) Light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire. 3) Clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot. 4) Chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour. 5) Make a color, mark, or symbol appear on an object/surface for 1 hour. 6) Create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in your hand (lasts until end of next turn).

controlOptions.name: Sensory Effect
controlOptions.effect: Create an instantaneous harmless sensory effect such as sparks, wind, music, or odor.

controlOptions.name: Fire Play
controlOptions.effect: Light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire.

controlOptions.name: Clean Or Soil
controlOptions.effect: Clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.

controlOptions.name: Minor Sensation
controlOptions.effect: Chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material.

controlOptions.name: Magic Mark
controlOptions.effect: Make a color, mark, or symbol appear on an object or surface.

controlOptions.name: Minor Creation
controlOptions.effect: Create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in your hand.
controlOptions.details: It lasts until the end of your next turn, and a trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth.

aiContext.prompt: The player is casting Prestidigitation. Adjudicate the desired effect. Allow harmless sensory effects, lighting/snuffing small fires, cleaning/soiling small objects, chilling/warming/flavoring nonliving material, making a magic mark, or creating a small nonmagical trinket/illusory image. Reject any effect that deals damage, mimics other spells, or exceeds the strict bounds of a cantrip. Describe the exact visual/sensory manifestation.

description: You create a magical effect within range. Choose the effect from the options below. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time. Sensory Effect. You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor. Fire Play. You instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire. Clean or Soil. You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot. Minor Sensation. You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour. Magic Mark. You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hour. Minor Creation. You create a nonmagical trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand. It lasts until the end of your next turn. A trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth.
